analysis.reasoning: Core message: Promotes Peking Opera as the quintessence of Chinese culture being refreshed by modern music, appealing to young generations, tagged #ChinaStory. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral) – not mentioned. CH2 (China benevolent internationally) – no reference to international conduct or multilateralism. CH3 (epic history/adversities) – while it implies cultural heritage, it does not mention historical resilience or overcoming adversity. CH4 (political system/values) – no political content. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – no governance or development claims. CH6 (China’s culture, nature, heritage) – yes; it highlights traditional culture (Peking Opera) and its modern appeal, promoting Chinese cultural heritage. Conclusion: Only CH6 applies.
